ef28769a2888880ec2178bf015084e17002959e7:
# Home Assistant App: Example app

## How to use

This app really does nothing. It's just an example.

When started it will print the configured message or "Hello world" in the log.

It will also print "All done!" in `/share/example_app_output.txt` to show
simple example of the usage of `map` in app config.
efe5b5c573b07fb15bd2cd29bf0f71aff3e653f3:
# Home Assistant App : exemple d'application

## Comment utiliser

Cette application ne fait vraiment rien. C'est juste un exemple.

When started it will print the configured message or "Hello world" in the log.

It will also print "All done !" in `/share/example_app_output.txt` to show
exemple simple de l'utilisation de `map` dans l'application config.

# Home Assistant App: Ejemplo de aplicación

## Cómo utilizar

Esta aplicación realmente no hace nada. It is just an example.

When started it will print the configured message or "Hello world" in the log.

It will print "All done!" in `/share/example_app_output.txt` to show
simple example of the usage of `map` in app config.
